homepageTitle: {{siteName}} – Shin ya tsaya? Matsayin hidima a lokacin gaske
homepageDescription: Sa ido kan matsayi a lokacin gaske domin daruruwan shahararrun hidimomi. Duba ko hidima ta tsaya, duba rahotannin tsayawa, kuma ka ga tarihin matsayi na awanni 12.
homepageTwitterDescription: Matsayi a lokacin gaske bisa rahotannin masu amfani domin dubban shahararrun hidimomi. Duba tsayawa kuma ka ga tarihin awanni 12.
homepageOgImageAlt: {{siteName}} – matsayi a lokacin gaske bisa rahotannin masu amfani
homepageJsonLdDescription: Sa ido kan matsayin hidima a lokacin gaske. Duba ko shahararrun hidimomi sun tsaya kuma ka ga rahotannin tsayawa.
serviceStatusDescriptionDown: {{service}} ya tsaya a halin yanzu. Duba matsayi a lokacin gaske, duba rahotannin tsayawa {{count}} na baya-bayan nan, kuma ka ga jadawalin tarihin awanni 12.
serviceStatusDescriptionUp: {{service}} yana aiki a halin yanzu. Duba matsayi a lokacin gaske, duba rahotannin tsayawa {{count}} na baya-bayan nan, kuma ka ga jadawalin tarihin awanni 12.
serviceAnnouncementTextDown: {{service}} yana fuskantar matsaloli a halin yanzu. An aika rahotannin masu amfani {{count}} a cikin awa daya da ta gabata. Duba matsayi kai tsaye da jadawalin rahoto na awanni 12 a {{url}}.
serviceAnnouncementTextUp: {{service}} yana aiki a halin yanzu. An aika rahotannin masu amfani {{count}} a cikin awa daya da ta gabata. Duba matsayi kai tsaye da jadawalin rahoto na awanni 12 a {{url}}.
serviceFaqStatusAnswerDown: {{service}} yana fuskantar matsaloli a halin yanzu. An sami rahotannin masu amfani {{count}} a cikin awa daya da ta gabata. Duba matsayi kai tsaye da jadawalin rahoto na awanni 12 a {{url}}.
serviceFaqStatusAnswerUp: {{service}} yana aiki a halin yanzu. An sami rahotannin masu amfani {{count}} a cikin awa daya da ta gabata. Duba matsayi kai tsaye da jadawalin rahoto na awanni 12 a {{url}}.
serviceFaqHowToCheckQuestion: Yaya za a duba ko {{service}} ya tsaya?
serviceFaqHowToCheckAnswer: Ziyarci {{url}} domin ganin matsayin {{service}} a lokacin gaske. Shafin yana nuna rahotannin tsayawa da masu amfani suka aika kai tsaye da jadawalin tarihin awanni 12 don ka iya sanin ko {{service}} ya tsaya ko yana da matsaloli.
serviceWebPageDescription: Sa ido kan matsayi da tsayawa a lokacin gaske domin {{service}}. Duba ko {{service}} ya tsaya kuma ka ga tarihin rahoto.
monitorYourWebsiteWithInstatus: Yi sa ido kan yanar gizonka da Instatus!
